title: Rebrand application from ClipTube to Beast Clipping

requirements.text: Update the application header branding in the Layout component to display 'Beast Clipping' instead of 'ClipTube'

quotes: Can you make it say beast clipping instead of clip tube?

acceptanceCriteria: The header text in the Layout component displays 'Beast Clipping'
The branding is visible on all pages of the application

requirements.text: Update the HTML page title in index.html to 'Beast Clipping' instead of any reference to 'ClipTube'

quotes: Can you make it say beast clipping instead of clip tube?

acceptanceCriteria: The browser tab displays 'Beast Clipping' as the page title

nonGoals: Altering the visual design or color scheme
